zustand_store.rule: Global application state ONLY. Used for cross-view synchronization (e.g., activeView, user understanding metrics, theme toggles).
zustand_store.forbidden: Do NOT put transient UI state (e.g., 'isDropdownOpen', 'typingBuffer') here to avoid massive app-wide rerenders.

local_component_state.rule: Use React.useState for anything that only affects a single component or its immediate children.

indexedDB_dexie.rule: Persistent knowledge and learning metrics ONLY.
indexedDB_dexie.forbidden: Do NOT store large blobs (like PDFs) here unless chunked and explicitly required. Avoid blocking the main thread with large full-table scans. Use indexes.

react_query_or_swr.rule: Not currently used. Server state is managed via direct fetch/SSE streams in components.
react_query_or_swr.forbidden: Do not introduce caching libraries without explicitly declaring an architectural transition.
